title: gypsophila arrostii
intro: Gypsophila arrostii, also known as Rosy gypsophila or Arrosti's gypsophila, is a flowering plant species within the family Caryophyllaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. Gypsophila arrostii is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting wound healing. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its effectiveness and safety are not extensively scientifically studied.
